title: EXAMPLES OF REQUESTS CLIENTS COME WITH
subtitle: Regression therapy helps find answers to various life questions and solve deep-rooted problems

items.0: Why do I constantly attract toxic relationships?
items.1: How to overcome fear of intimacy and trust?
items.2: Why can't I find a partner for a serious relationship?

items.0: Where do my panic attacks come from?
items.1: How to get rid of chronic anxiety?
items.2: Why do I feel constant fatigue and exhaustion?

items.1: Why can't I realize my potential?
items.2: What are my hidden talents and abilities?

items.0: Why can't I find a job that brings satisfaction?
items.1: Where does my fear of success come from?

items.0: Why do I keep making the same mistakes?
items.1: How to find my path in life?
items.2: Why do I feel stuck in one place?

items.0: What is the psychological cause of my chronic diseases?
items.2: Why does my body react with stress to certain situations?

footer: These are just some examples of requests. Regression therapy can help with many other questions and problems.
